---
title: "Getting Started with Quarto Websites"
date: 2026-06-04
author: "Your Name"
categories: [quarto, web development, tutorial]
description: "A comprehensive guide to building modern websites with Quarto, covering setup, customization, and deployment."
---

Quarto is a powerful open-source publishing system that combines the simplicity of Markdown with the power of computational documents. In this post, we'll explore how to create beautiful, modern websites using Quarto.

## Why Quarto?

- **Markdown-based**: Write content naturally in Markdown
- **Executable code**: Embed Python, R, or Julia code that runs during rendering
- **Beautiful output**: Professional-looking HTML, PDF, and more
- **Extensible**: Customize with CSS, JavaScript, and more
- **Fast**: Quick preview and build times

## Getting Started

### Installation

Visit [quarto.org](https://quarto.org) and download the installer for your operating system.

### Your First Website

```bash
quarto create-project my-website --type website
cd my-website
quarto preview
```

## Key Features

### 1. Markdown Support
Standard Markdown syntax with extensions for tables, code blocks, and more.

### 2. Code Execution
```{python}
import datetime
print(f"This post was created on {datetime.date.today()}")
```

### 3. YAML Front Matter
Control metadata and rendering options with YAML:
```yaml
---
title: "My Post"
date: 2026-06-04
categories: [tech, tutorial]
---
```

## Customization

Quarto offers extensive customization through CSS and configuration files. You can:
- Change themes
- Customize colors and fonts
- Modify layouts
- Add custom JavaScript

## Next Steps

- Explore the [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/)
- Check out the [Quarto gallery](https://quarto.org/docs/gallery/)
- Start building your own website!

Happy documenting! 🚀
